pr_activity: PR #11 merged at ef4c186 between session-a and session-b (manual user action while I was holding).
Cut new branch marketplace-portable-install.followup from updated main (ef4c186). Phase 1 manifest.branch updated to point at it.
Committed + pushed W7 (e00c808), W8 (1cbc00e), W9 (c6b58e0) — three workstream commits on the follow-up branch.

Opened PR #12 (https://github.com/krambuhl/agents/pull/12): '[migration] Marketplace portable install — part 2 (W7-W9 sync + README + cleanup)'. Body explicitly names sync-generated files for R7 mitigation.
what_happened: Resumed mid-session after PR #11 merged. Pulled main; cut marketplace-portable-install.followup branch.

W7 (the meaty one): refactored loom verbs from cli/verbs/*.ts to cli/verbs/loom/*.ts via git mv (20 file renames + relative-path-depth fixes). Wrote scripts/sync-shared.ts (~250 lines, default sync mode + --check drift-detection mode, pure copy, 3 record kinds for drift: divergent / missing / orphan). Wrote scripts/sync-shared.test.ts (12 V10 tests across 3 describe blocks for PLAN cases a/b/c). Ran first sync — 69 files / ~452 KB landed at plugins/<plugin>/cli/.

W8: rewrote README.md (85 → 145 lines). Primary install command becomes `claude plugin install agent-loop-full@krambuhl --scope user` per W0 V1 finding. Dropped install.sh + ~/.agents symlink-farm + bin/loom adopt + npx skills add narratives. Added 6-plugin table with cascade dependencies, install-scope rationale, griot init post-install step, canonical-vs-generated layout explanation.

W9: deleted install.sh. Cleaned up the three non-substrate references (README historical, docs/AGENT-CONVENTIONS.md docs-path-resolution section, .gitignore comment). Wrote cli/no-install-sh-refs.test.ts grep tripwire (2 assertions: file-not-tracked + no-refs-outside-projects/). First run caught .gitignore's comment still naming install.sh — fixed and re-ran clean.
All 10 workstreams shipped: W0-W6 in PR #11 (merged), W7-W9 in PR #12 (open). npm test: 610/610 passing at session end (was 596 at PR #11 merge; +14 across V10 + W9 tripwire).
open_threads: PR #12 needs review + merge to complete the migration. After merge: V6 + V7 smoke tests (personal Mac + Patreon machine) ground-truth the install flow.

V6 protocol: `claude plugin marketplace add krambuhl/agents` + `claude plugin install agent-loop-full@krambuhl --scope user` + run a small skill end-to-end. Confirms the marketplace install flow works in practice.
V7 protocol: same install on Patreon machine + colleague-session invisibility check. Verifies the load-bearing 'invisible to colleagues' claim that W0 V1's --scope user recommendation rests on.
V8: public-publish gating (V6/V7 before-or-after-public). Documented as open question in PLAN.

Optional follow-up: CI hookup of `scripts/sync-shared.ts --check`. PLAN names this as W7 scope but the wiring (GitHub Action or pre-commit hook) was deferred. Worth doing before the next significant cli/ edit.
Phase 1 manifest still shows status=in-progress (correct — PR #12 not yet merged). Once PR #12 merges, /loom-archive can run if the user wants to archive the project.

Substrate-path bug fix in eb618d4 (PR #11) means future panel runs in this repo auto-derive correctly. The W1-W4 manual panel overrides documented in earlier checkins are no longer needed for new units.
notes: Branch state at session end: marketplace-portable-install.followup is 3 commits ahead of main (e00c808 W7, 1cbc00e W8, c6b58e0 W9). All commits pushed; PR #12 open with body explicitly naming sync-generated files for R7 review-mitigation.

Session productivity: 3 workstreams + 1 PR-cut + 1 PR-open in this session. Combined with session-a (W0-W6 + the substrate-path fix + the PLAN revise + a11y-review-file deletion + PR #11 prep), the full migration shipped over two sessions.

Evaluator panel was skipped for W7 explicitly (large mechanical-mostly artifact + strong pre-computed verification via V10's 12 tests). Other units (W8, W9) had narrower scopes and didn't go through guild-validate either — judgment call to keep momentum. The next session reviewing PR #12 can be the catch-up if any unit's checkin warrants a panel pass.

Generator-output sizing: 69 files / ~452 KB across 3 plugins. W0's estimate was ~125 files / ~908 KB — the actual is ~50% smaller because runtime-only excludes test files. Reviewer cognitive load (R6) is correspondingly lower than worst-case.
Next /ev-run on this project: either /loom-archive after PR #12 merges, or a new project entirely. Phase 1 won't transition to in-progress on a new branch (it's the only phase).
